official_functions.role: Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

official_functions.function_or_member: ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket(int, Suggestions), ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket(int, int, int, List<Entry>), ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.toSuggestions(), ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.Entry.STREAM_CODEC, ByteBufCodecs.VAR_INT, ByteBufCodecs.STRING_UTF8, ComponentSerialization.TRUSTED_OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC
official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the command_suggestions id/range/suggestion-list body
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound command_suggestions frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns command_suggestions immediately after clear_titles.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the command_suggestions id to ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket.
The official command_suggestions body is command id VarInt, range start VarInt, range length VarInt, and a list of Entry records.
Each official Entry is text STRING_UTF8 plus optional trusted Component tooltip; this fixture uses an empty list, so no Entry bytes are present.

The empty-suggestions fixture uses the official ClientboundCommandSuggestionsPacket(int, Suggestions) constructor with StringRange.between(1, 4), so it does not require an initialized command tree, command context, Level, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded field values, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.

This contract does not prove non-empty suggestion Entry text/tooltip handling, Brigadier command tree semantics, command context behavior, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer non-empty suggestion Entry text/tooltip handling, Brigadier command tree semantics, command context behavior, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
